title: Cleaning the Apartment
content: Kevin spent Saturday cleaning his apartment. Clothes were on the floor, dishes filled the sink, and dust covered the shelves. He opened the windows to let fresh air inside and turned on his favorite music. First, he washed the dishes. Then he vacuumed the carpet and cleaned the bathroom. The work took several hours, but the apartment looked much better afterward. In the evening, Kevin sat on the sofa with a cold drink and admired the clean space. He felt relaxed and proud of himself.
